text.message: If red gets 6 11 and port he just wins.
You traded me 2 which I used
If you had got the port and the 6 11 it would have been double ore, double wheat, double sheep
Red, you're throwing the game now.
You can't just give him a city
Why help blue though I don’t get it
13 cards and you're giving him a 1 for 1
I’m not sure what you’re talking about
Trading you while we all make wood is throwing
I would plow blue if I could...but i didn't have enough
Blue has two open settles to win
I'm sure red will trade it to you 1 for 1
why would u plow him again
Because it doubles me up on the 5
You both are greedy with your plows
The point of this game is to try and win it
